boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Insurance claims / coverage controls action now? Action: total-loss settlement missing title document. Boundary: valuation memo cannot settle without title closure.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records fail to close boundary

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Control record notes match but action explicitly lacks title document. Valuation memo cannot close boundary per SRC-1A498A3B0119-BND. Escalate to resolve dependency before any settlement.
